entries.source: Khan Academy is built around a broad library of lessons, practice, standards-aligned content, and mastery support.
entries.value: Khan Academy lessons, practice, standards-aligned content, र mastery support को broad library वरिपरि built छ।

entries.source: Khan Academy is excellent for structured lessons and practice. inspir is built for the moment a learner needs a live, promptable AI mode that can respond to their exact question, draft, problem, argument, or study plan.
entries.value: Khan Academy structured lessons र practice का लागि उत्कृष्ट छ। inspir learner लाई आफ्नो exact question, draft, problem, argument, वा study plan मा respond गर्न सक्ने live, promptable AI mode चाहिएको क्षणका लागि built छ।

entries.value: Khanmigo आधिकारिक पृष्ठ

entries.source: Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.
entries.value: learners प्रायः आफूले पहिले नै चिनेको product सँग search गर्छन्। useful answer winner-take-all होइन; कुन tool behavior job सँग fit हुन्छ भन्ने हो।

entries.source: Many learners search by comparing tools they already know. A clear comparison page helps them choose the right learning behavior without hiding the tradeoffs.
entries.value: धेरै learners आफूले पहिले नै चिनेका tools compare गरेर search गर्छन्। clear comparison page ले tradeoffs नलुकाई सही learning behavior choose गर्न मद्दत गर्छ।

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: होइन। comparison ले public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, र learning paths मा मात्र link गर्छ। Private saved conversations source content का रूपमा प्रयोग हुँदैनन्।

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: होइन। comparison pages live AI tutoring, prompts, र guest learning modes का लागि inspir कहिले better first click हो, र structured curriculum वा official course library कहिले अझै useful हुन सक्छ भन्ने देखाउन लेखिएका हुन्।

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: होइन। तिनीहरूले public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, र learning paths मा मात्र link गर्छन्। Private saved chats discovery surfaces बाहिर रहन्छन्।

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: हरेक learning need मा होइन। Khan Academy structured lessons र practice का लागि useful छ। inspir learner ले आफूले गरिरहेको exact thing वरिपरि live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, वा study workflow चाहिँदा useful हुन्छ।

entries.source: Some searches need a course library. Some need a live AI tutor, a hint, a Socratic question, a quiz, or a flashcard deck. These pages make that choice clearer.
entries.value: केही searches लाई course library चाहिन्छ। केहीलाई live AI tutor, hint, Socratic question, quiz, वा flashcard deck चाहिन्छ। यी pages ले त्यो choice स्पष्ट बनाउँछन्।

entries.source: Start here
entries.value: यहाँ सुरु गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: सिक्न सुरु गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Structured practice helps build foundations before and after homework.
entries.value: Structured practice ले homework अघि र पछि foundations build गर्न मद्दत गर्छ।

entries.source: Students who want hints or step checks without answer-copying.
entries.value: answer-copying बिना hints वा step checks चाहने students।

entries.source: Teachers or parents evaluating focused AI learning behaviors before a school deployment.
entries.value: school deployment अघि focused AI learning behaviors evaluate गर्ने teachers वा parents।

entries.source: The comparison searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: यस hub ले answer गर्न built comparison searches।

entries.source: The point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. The point is to match the learning job to the behavior that helps fastest.
entries.value: point दुई फरक tools लाई एउटै winner मा flatten गर्नु होइन। point learning job लाई fastest help गर्ने behavior सँग match गर्नु हो।

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: यो page answer गर्न designed searches।

entries.source: These are the high-intent moments where a learner usually needs a live teaching behavior rather than another broad page.
entries.value: यी high-intent moments हुन् जहाँ learner लाई usually another broad page भन्दा live teaching behavior चाहिन्छ।

entries.source: These phrases are surfaced naturally on the page and in structured discovery files so crawlers can understand the exact comparison intent.
entries.value: यी phrases page र structured discovery files मा naturally surfaced छन् ताकि crawlers exact comparison intent बुझ्न सकून्।

entries.source: This is not a claim that learners should abandon Khan Academy. For many topics, a trusted lesson library and a live AI learning mode work best together: learn the foundation, then use inspir to ask questions, repair confusion, practise recall, or get unstuck.
entries.value: यो learners ले Khan Academy abandon गर्नुपर्छ भन्ने claim होइन। धेरै topics का लागि trusted lesson library र live AI learning mode सँगै best काम गर्छन्: foundation सिक्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि questions सोध्न, confusion repair गर्न, recall practise गर्न, वा unstuck हुन inspir प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Tool comparison
entries.value: उपकरण तुलना

entries.source: Try the live AI learning path.
entries.value: live AI learning path प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Turn the explanation into quiz questions, flashcards, and a review schedule based on what you miss.
entries.value: व्याख्यालाई quiz question, flashcard, र तपाईंले छुटाएका कुरामा आधारित review schedule मा बदल्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: ट्युटरिङ

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: ठ्याक्कै confusion को बिन्दु थाहा छ र अर्को explanation, question, hint, वा review loop चाहिन्छ भने live mode प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: course area थाहा छ र sequenced explanation वा practice set चाहिन्छ भने structured lesson प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use cases
entries.value: use cases

entries.source: Use comparison pages to route search into action.
entries.value: comparison pages लाई search लाई action तर्फ route गर्न प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use inspir first when your search is about an action: explain this simply, ask me Socratic questions, give me a homework hint, check my math step, quiz me, build flashcards, debate this topic, or help me plan revision.
entries.value: तपाईंको search action बारे छ भने पहिले inspir प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्: explain this simply, ask me Socratic questions, give me a homework hint, check my math step, quiz me, build flashcards, debate this topic, वा help me plan revision।

entries.source: Use inspir to turn confusion into questions, examples, retrieval practice, writing feedback, debate, and a personal study plan.
entries.value: confusion लाई questions, examples, retrieval practice, writing feedback, debate, र personal study plan मा बदल्न inspir प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use inspir when the stuck point is specific.
entries.value: stuck point विशिष्ट हुँदा inspir प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use inspir when you want a free public AI learning mode that can explain, question, quiz, coach homework, build flashcards, and adapt to the exact thing you are stuck on.
entries.value: explain, question, quiz, coach homework, build flashcards गर्न र तपाईं अड्किएको ठ्याक्कै कुरामा adapt हुन सक्ने free public AI learning mode चाहिँदा inspir प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use structured lessons when the path is known.
entries.value: path थाहा हुँदा structured lessons प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use the comparison below to pick the first public mode or guide.
entries.value: पहिलो public mode वा guide छान्न तलको comparison प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use the lesson library to learn the official sequence and practise core skills.
entries.value: official sequence सिक्न र core skills अभ्यास गर्न lesson library प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use the right tool for the learning job.
entries.value: learning job का लागि सही tool प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use Time Travel or Historical Person mode, while keeping generated dialogue separate from documented sources.
entries.value: generated dialogue लाई documented sources बाट अलग राख्दै Time Travel वा Historical Person mode प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Want the live learning version right now?
entries.value: अहिल्यै live learning version चाहनुहुन्छ?

entries.source: When should I use inspir first?
entries.value: मैले पहिले inspir कहिले प्रयोग गर्नुपर्छ?

entries.value: कहिले प्रयोग गर्ने

entries.source: When to use {value1}, and when to open inspir.
entries.value: {value1} कहिले प्रयोग गर्ने, र inspir कहिले खोल्ने।

entries.source: Why make comparison pages at all?
entries.value: comparison pages बनाउनु नै किन?

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: हो। राम्रो workflow भनेको trusted lesson source बाट foundation सिक्नु, त्यसपछि follow-up questions सोध्न, recall practice गर्न, misconceptions repair गर्न, र अर्को review के गर्ने plan बनाउन inspir प्रयोग गर्नु हो।
